[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m816[0m[34m of [0m[33m2464[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000702[0m

  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m

   Pattern: [32m(env|environment).{1,50}(get|post|curl|nc|invoke-restmethod)[0m
[30;1m20 | [0m[35m * will remain to ensure logic does not differ in production.[0m
[30;1m21 | [0m[35m */[0m
[30;1m22 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m23 | [0m[35mvar NODE_ENV = process.env.NODE_ENV;[0m
[30;1m24 | [0m[35m[0m

[30;1m128 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m129 | [0m[35mConfig variables can be passed in an object to the `keystone.init` method, or can be set any time be[0m
[30;1m130 | [0m[35mcalled using `keystone.set(key, value)`. This allows for a more flexible order of execution (e.g. if[0m
[30;1m131 | [0m[35mroutes, you can set the routes after configuring your Lists, as in the example above).[0m
